contributor.name: Alice (jam participant)
contributor.sovereignty_context: Salish Sea coastal community network — individual contributor; no Nation-specific authority claimed

body.intent: Commit to monitoring kelp recruitment at Race Rocks station monthly for 12 months, contributing observations to the Salish Sea Marine Survey commons.
body.scope: Race Rocks Ecological Reserve, southern Vancouver Island, BC
body.quantity: 12 monthly site visits, approx 6 hr each
body.redeems_against: Salish Sea Marine Survey commitment-pool — shared bioregional baseline dataset

place.location_specific: Race Rocks Ecological Reserve, southern Vancouver Island, BC
place.jurisdiction: Province of BC, Canada; traditional territory of the Songhees and Esquimalt Nations (acknowledged, not claimed-on-behalf-of)

purpose: Contribute to bioregional kelp-forest baseline monitoring. Build relational tenure with the bioregion through repeated witnessed presence. Make a small commitment that can be redeemed against a shared dataset others also draw from.

self_attestation.statement: I commit to the monitoring schedule described above. I will honor refusal at any time if Race Rocks coordinators determine my contribution is no longer welcome or needed. I am not authorized to speak on behalf of any Nation in this commitment.

result.summary: No voice_discipline violations detected; verb_discipline + voice_discipline checks clean
All extractable claims grounded in commitment body itself; no external-source claims to audit
No extractive-abstraction drift; no ontological-erasure-via-guardrails; no alignment-faking signals

sovereignty.authorization_basis: Self-attested commitment by individual contributor; public openness is contributor's explicit choice. Contribution is bioregional-ecological, not Nation-specific.

multi_witness_bind.audit_trace_summary: Voice / citation / worldview audits all passed. Composition produced no blocking flags. Receipt cleared for emission.

refusal.withdrawal_authority: self (did:example:participant-alice) AND Race Rocks ecological reserve coordinator authority
